title: Training Corpora Census (C4)
subtitle: 34.1M documents scanned for sovereignty framing in Google C4 training corpus
method: Rust classifier (91 signals, 3 languages) applied to full C4 English, Russian, and Ukrainian splits
key_findings: 507K documents in C4 contain Russia-framing of Crimea
6,856 documents (1.35%) from media on OFAC/EU/UK sanctions lists
59 academic DOIs with Russia-framing found in C4
1,241 quoted examples where framing appears in quotation context
Geodata bridge proven: Natural Earth/OSM/weather pages literally in C4
